{{Infobox character
| name = Alsa Grayweather
| aliases = Alsa
| children = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Imperial Steward Calder Marten|Calder Marten]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Read the heart, summon Elderspawn}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|commander of the outpost, right hand of the Blackwatch Guild}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Blackwatch]], [[Blackwatch|Blackwatch Guild]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Commander|commander]]}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|Of Sea and Shadow]]
}}

''See also: [[Alsa Grayweather Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Alsa [[Grayweather]] is a high-ranking official within the [[Blackwatch Guild]], serving as the right hand to the [[Guild]] Head, Bliss. In this capacity, she acts as a primary aide and leader within the disciplined, regimented army of the [[Blackwatch]]. Beyond her professional role, she is a woman of significant social standing in the Capital; she possesses an ancestral lineage dating back to the beginning of the Empire, maintains a residence in a wealthy district, and adheres to the latest [[Imperial]] fashions. She is also the mother of [[Calder]]. Alsa is characterized by her competence and composure, often serving as a grounding influence for Bliss. She has demonstrated significant combat proficiency, utilizing both a saber and a musket as a blunt weapon when necessary to defend against threats such as the [[Children]] or [[Elderspawn]]. Despite her status, she has faced periods of confinement ordered by [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] and has been involved in various [[Guild]]-related projects and military commands, including leading an outpost.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Alsa [[Grayweather]] is a Reader and former [[Blackwatch]] employee who serves as the commander of the outpost and the right hand of the [[Blackwatch Guild]]. As the mother of [[Calder]] [[Marten]], she resides in the same home as his guardian and maintains a level of distrust regarding [[Calder]]'s ability to handle laundry. During an initial attack, she fought using a [[sword]] and even used her musket as a club, while carrying seven [[Awakened iron]] spikes in her coat. Throughout her history, she spent nearly two years attempting to summon [[Elderspawn]] and has successfully Awakened a saber. Currently, she remains under the personal supervision of Bliss, to whom she suggested that a return was imminent and who intends to return to her.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">22</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Alsa is [[Calder]]'s mother.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c4">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Alsa is a Reader.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Alsa worked for the [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Alsa Grayweather]] is [[Calder]]'s mother.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Alsa Grayweather]] uses a [[sword]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Alsa Grayweather]] is the commander of the outpost.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Alsa Grayweather]] is the right hand of the [[Blackwatch Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Alsa carries seven [[Awakened iron]] spikes in her coat.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Alsa is a character who attempts to [[Read]] the heart.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Alsa was the subject of an initial attack.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Alsa Grayweather]] fights using a musket as a club.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Alsa gives orders to the [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Alsa Grayweather]] is the resident of a residence where [[Calder]] [[Marten]]'s guardian resides.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c13">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Alsa suggested that Bliss would be back soon.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Alsa offered to accompany [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c15">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Alsa Grayweather]] is a person Bliss intends to return to.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Alsa does not trust [[Calder]] with the laundry.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Alsa Grayweather]] has a home.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Alsa Grayweather]] attempted to summon [[Elderspawn]] for almost two years.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c24">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Alsa is a person who Awakened a saber.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Alsa Grayweather]]'s son had a trial.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Alsa Grayweather]] is under the personal supervision of Bliss.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Alsa Grayweather]] is a [[Guild]] member in good standing.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c5">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Alsa Grayweather]] is the only one who can bring Bliss back to reason.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Alsa Grayweather]] is someone Bliss would ask for help.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Alsa carries a saber and a pistol.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Alsa Grayweather]] identified the people as citizens of the [[Imperial]] Palace.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Alsa Grayweather]] is someone Bliss would be hurt by if she had to kill [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“I’m surprised your father didn’t tell you. What did you think I did for the Blackwatch?”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c4" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“He takes after his father,” Alsa said flatly, resting her hand on the hilt of her own sword.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“I’ll go back to Alsa Grayweather at some point in the future, but for now, I expect she would want me here.”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Blackwatch]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Readers]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
